title: Navigate from Home to Portfolio via navigation links
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the landing page to the portfolio page and see portfolio content render after a transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Click the navigation link to view the portfolio page
Verify portfolio projects are displayed

title: Navigate from Home to Services via navigation links
description: Verifies that a visitor can move from the landing page to the services page and see services content render after a transition.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Click the navigation link to view the services page
Verify a list of services is displayed

title: Primary content loads on each main route
description: Verifies that each key page route loads and renders its primary content area.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the navigation link to view the about page
Click the navigation link to view the portfolio page
Click the navigation link to view the services page
Click the navigation link to view the FAQ page
Click the navigation link to view the contact page
Verify the contact inquiry form is displayed

title: Smooth scroll responds to repeated scroll interactions on Home
description: Verifies that scrolling interactions move the page content and do not lock the user in place.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Scroll down the page
Scroll down the page again
Scroll up the page
Verify the landing page content continues to change as the user scrolls

title: Reduced motion: navigation still works and content renders
description: Verifies that with reduced motion enabled, the user can still navigate and content renders (without relying on heavy animations).

steps.description: Navigate to /
Enable reduced motion preference in the browser or test environment
Scroll down the page
Click the navigation link to view the portfolio page
Verify portfolio projects are displayed

title: Sitemap route loads and supports navigation to pages
description: Verifies that the sitemap page loads and allows navigating to another page using sitemap links.

steps.description: Navigate to /sitemap
Click a sitemap link to navigate to a main page
Verify the destination page primary content is displayed

title: Submit contact inquiry with all fields and completed reCAPTCHA
description: Verifies that a visitor can fill the inquiry form, complete reCAPTCHA, submit, and see an on-screen confirmation.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Demo Sender into the name field
Fill demo.sender@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid phone number into the WhatsApp field
Select a valid budget option
Fill This is an automated inquiry message for testing into the message field
Complete the reCAPTCHA verification
Submit the contact form
Verify a success confirmation is visible

title: Contact form validation: missing email shows an error
description: Verifies that submitting the contact form without a required email shows a validation error.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Demo Sender into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the WhatsApp field
Select a valid budget option
Fill This message is submitted without an email into the message field
Complete the reCAPTCHA verification
Submit the contact form
Verify an email validation error is visible

title: Contact form prevents submit when reCAPTCHA is not completed
description: Verifies that the form cannot be successfully submitted without completing reCAPTCHA and the user is prompted to complete it.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Demo Sender into the name field
Fill demo.sender@example.com into the email field
Fill a valid phone number into the WhatsApp field
Select a valid budget option
Fill Attempt submission without reCAPTCHA into the message field
Submit the contact form
Verify a reCAPTCHA requirement or validation prompt is visible

title: Contact form retains entered values after client-side validation error
description: Verifies that when validation fails, previously entered user input remains in the form to avoid re-typing.

steps.description: Navigate to /contact
Fill Demo Sender into the name field
Fill a valid phone number into the WhatsApp field
Select a valid budget option
Fill Preserve my input after validation error into the message field
Complete the reCAPTCHA verification
Submit the contact form
Verify the previously entered message text Preserve my input after validation error is still present in the message field

title: FAQ search filters questions and allows expanding an item
description: Verifies that searching filters the FAQ list and an item can be expanded to read its answer.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Fill a keyword from a visible FAQ question into the FAQ search field
Click an FAQ item in the filtered results to expand it
Verify the expanded FAQ answer content is displayed

title: FAQ expand then collapse toggles the answer visibility
description: Verifies that an FAQ item can be expanded and then collapsed.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Click an FAQ item to expand it
Click the same FAQ item to collapse it
Verify the FAQ answer content is not displayed for that item

title: FAQ search with nonexistent keyword shows no-results state
description: Verifies that searching for a keyword that matches nothing shows a no-results state.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Fill a clearly nonexistent keyword into the FAQ search field
Verify a no-results empty state is displayed

title: FAQ search can be cleared to restore the full list
description: Verifies that clearing the search restores the full FAQ list.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Fill a keyword from a visible FAQ question into the FAQ search field
Clear the FAQ search field
Verify multiple FAQ items are displayed

title: FAQ page loads primary content and is interactive without search
description: Verifies the FAQ page loads and users can expand an item without using search.

steps.description: Navigate to /faq
Scroll down the FAQ list
Click an FAQ item to expand it
Verify the expanded FAQ answer content is displayed
